properties.sql:
SELECT c_applied_programme AS programme,
              count(*)::text AS total,
              count(*) FILTER (WHERE c_status IN ('approved','auto_approved'))::text AS approved,
              CASE WHEN count(*) > 0
                   THEN ROUND(count(*) FILTER (WHERE c_status IN ('approved','auto_approved'))::numeric / count(*) * 100, 1)::text
                   ELSE '0' END AS approval_rate
       FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 WHERE c_applied_programme IS NOT NULL
       GROUP BY programme ORDER BY programme
